name: libexif12
title: libexif12
description:
library to parse EXIF files
Most digital cameras produce EXIF files, which are JPEG files with
extra tags that contain information about the image. The EXIF library
allows you to parse an EXIF file and read the data from those tags.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libexif12 because library to parse EXIF files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libexif12 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libexif12 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libexif12 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
